case_title: JOSEPH KONG VS. TAYLER WILLIAMS et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, TAYLER

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KONG, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, TAYLER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 634A MASONIC AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94117, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONG, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, TAYLER DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $27.94. FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONG, JOSEPH
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, TAYLER
DECLARATION REGARDING LOST ORIGINAL LEASE AGREEMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONG, JOSEPH
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, TAYLER
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONG, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, TAYLER
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONG, JOSEPH SERVED JAN-31-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, TAYLER
